burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate to high due to heart failure and arrhythmias

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography showing LV dilation and reduced EF; evaluate ischemic and secondary causes; cardiac MRI when available

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on HF therapy adherence and access to devices

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo widely available in cardiology services; MRI in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Guideline-directed HF therapy, ICD/CRT for selected patients, transplant in advanced cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to advanced devices and transplant programs outside major centers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Core HF medications available in SUS and cardiology networks
